audits.scope: Revenue recognition, accounts payable, payroll, inventory valuation, and internal controls over financial reporting.

findings.title: Internal Controls — Segregation of Duties
findings.detail: Single approver for both purchase orders and payments. Recommend adding a secondary approval for transactions over $5,000.

findings.title: Inventory Valuation
findings.detail: Food inventory not written down for spoilage within the 90-day period. Requires a $28,700 reserve adjustment.

audits.scope: HR practices, vendor contract compliance, operating procedures, health & safety protocols, and regulatory adherence.
audits.standards: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management Systems; OSHA 29 CFR Part 1910

findings.title: Incident Reporting
findings.detail: 2 minor kitchen burns not formally logged in safety system within required 24-hour window.

findings.title: Standard Operating Procedures
findings.detail: 4 SOPs out of 18 not updated to reflect Q3 2023 process changes. Recommend quarterly SOP review cycle.

audits.scope: HACCP plan validation, temperature monitoring, supplier qualification, allergen management, and traceability.
audits.standards: FSMA 21 CFR Part 117; ISO 22000:2018; GFSI Benchmark
audits.opinion: Unqualified Opinion with Emphasis of Matter

findings.title: Traceability Records
findings.detail: Forward traceability test completed in 4.2 hours vs. 4-hour target. Minor process adjustment recommended.

findings.title: Allergen Management
findings.detail: Cross-contamination risk identified for tree nut allergens; shared equipment cleaning protocol insufficient. Requires dedicated utensils for allergen-free items.

findings.title: Corrective Action Records
findings.detail: Corrective action forms for 3 prior findings not closed out within the required 30-day period.

findings.title: HACCP Temperature Log Gaps
findings.detail: Temperature logs show 4 instances of missing readings during evening shifts at this location. Corrective action: automated monitoring system recommended.

audits.scope: Vendor performance, contract compliance, purchasing controls, and supplier risk management.
audits.standards: ISO 28000:2022 Supply Chain Security; COSO Internal Control Framework

findings.title: Contract Renewal Management
findings.detail: 2 vendor contracts expired 30–45 days before renewal. Automated renewal alerts not configured in procurement system.

findings.title: Purchasing Approvals
findings.detail: 6 purchases between $3,000–$5,000 approved without required dual-sign-off per policy. Purchasing card policy refresh required.

findings.title: Minority & Sustainable Supplier Targets
findings.detail: Diverse supplier spend at 11% vs. 15% corporate target. Progress noted; trajectory suggests target achievable by Q3 2024.

findings.title: Vendor Concentration Risk
findings.detail: 62% of fresh produce sourced from single vendor. Continuity risk in case of supplier disruption. Recommend dual-sourcing strategy.
